longTestimonial: Dear Jerry and Joan, It was so good to see you and visit your lovely gallery.  Thank you for initiating the cleaning of our painting "monkey business."  We are so very happy with the results of the conservation.  It was also wonderful to break bread at the Bedford Springs Hotel and celebrate Jerry and my mutual July birthdays.  Enjoy the remainder of summer.
name: Deardra & Vince M.
shortTestimonial: Dear Jerry and Joan, It was so good to see you and visit your lovely gallery.
